00020 
00024 #include "wrappers.h"
00025 
00026 #include "class.h"
00027 #include "field.h"
00028 #include "util.h"
00029 
00030 /******************************************************************************
00031  * Field implementation                                                       *
00032  ******************************************************************************/
00033 
00038 size_t field_size(const field_t *field)
00039 {
00040     switch (field->descriptor[0]) {
00041         case '[': // FALLTHROUGH
00042         case 'L':
00043             return SIZEOF_VOID_P;
00044 
00045         case 'B': // FALLTHROUGH
00046         case 'Z':
00047             return 1;
00048 
00049         case 'C': // FALLTHROUGH
00050         case 'S':
00051             return 2;
00052 
00053         case 'I': // FALLTHROUGH
00054 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00055         case 'F':
00056 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00057             return 4;
00058 
00059         case 'J': // FALLTHROUGH
00060 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00061         case 'D':
00062 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00063             return 8;
00064 
00065         default:
00066             dbg_unreachable();
00067             return -1;
00068     }
00069 } // field_size()
00070 
00074 void field_parse_descriptor(const char *desc)
00075 {
00076     uint32_t i, j; // A couple of counters
00077     uint32_t dimensions; // Dimensions of an array
00078 
00079     i = 0;
00080 
00081     if (desc[0] == 0) {
00082         goto error;
00083     }
00084 
00085     switch (desc[i]) {
00086         case 'B':
00087         case 'C':
00088 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00089         case 'D':
00090         case 'F':
00091 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00092         case 'I':
00093         case 'J':
00094         case 'S':
00095         case 'Z':
00096             i++;
00097             goto basic;
00098 
00099         case 'L':
00100             j = i + 1;
00101 
00102             while (desc[j] != ';' && desc[j] != 0) {
00103                 j++;
00104             }
00105 
00106             if (desc[j] == 0) {
00107                 goto error;
00108             }
00109 
00110             return;
00111 
00112         case '[':
00113             dimensions = 0;
00114 
00115             while (desc[i] == '[') {
00116                 i++;
00117                 dimensions++;
00118 
00119                 if ((desc[i] == 0) || dimensions > 255) {
00120                     goto error;
00121                 }
00122             }
00123 
00124             switch (desc[i]) {
00125                 case 'B':
00126                 case 'C':
00127 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00128                 case 'D':
00129                 case 'F':
00130 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00131                 case 'I':
00132                 case 'J':
00133                 case 'S':
00134                 case 'Z':
00135                     if (desc[i + 1] != 0) {
00136                         goto error;
00137                     }
00138 
00139                     // Basic array class
00140                     return;
00141 
00142                 case 'L':
00143                     while (desc[i] != ';' && desc[i] != 0) {
00144                         i++;
00145                     }
00146 
00147                     if (desc[i] == 0) {
00148                         goto error;
00149                     }
00150 
00151                     return;
00152 
00153                 default:
00154                     goto error;
00155             }
00156 
00157         default:
00158             goto error;
00159     }
00160 
00161 basic:
00162     if (desc[i] == 0) {
00163         return;
00164     }
00165 
00166 error:
00167     c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Invalid field descriptor");
00168 } // field_parse_descriptor()
00169 
00174 uintptr_t static_field_data_ptr(static_field_t *static_field)
00175 {
00176     switch (static_field->field->descriptor[0]) {
00177         case 'L': // FALLTHROUGH
00178         case '[': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jref);
00179         case 'B': // FALLTHROUGH
00180         case 'Z': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jbyte);
00181         case 'C': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jchar);
00182         case 'S': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jshort);
00183         case 'I': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jint);
00184         case 'J': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jlong);
00185 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00186         case 'F': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jfloat);
00187         case 'D': return (uintptr_t) &(static_field->data.jdouble);
00188 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00189         default:
00190             dbg_unreachable();
00191             return (uintptr_t) NULL;
00192     }
00193 } // static_field_data_ptr()
00194 
00195 /******************************************************************************
00196  * Field iterators implementation                                             *
00197  ******************************************************************************/
00198 
00205 static field_t *field_itr_find_next(field_t *curr, field_t *end, bool stat)
00206 {
00207     while (curr < end) {
00208         if (field_is_static(curr) == stat) {
00209             return curr;
00210         }
00211 
00212         curr++;
00213     }
00214 
00215     return NULL;
00216 } // field_itr_find_next()
00217 
00224 field_iterator_t field_itr(class_t *cl, bool stat)
00225 {
00226     field_iterator_t itr;
00227     field_t *end = cl->fields + cl->fields_n;
00228 
00229     itr.next = field_itr_find_next(cl->fields, end, stat);
00230     itr.end = end;
00231     itr.stat = stat;
00232 
00233     return itr;
00234 } // field_itr()
00235 
00240 field_t *field_itr_get_next(field_iterator_t *itr)
00241 {
00242     field_t *field = itr->next;
00243 
00244     assert(field_itr_has_next(*itr));
00245     itr->next = field_itr_find_next(field + 1, itr->end, itr->stat);
00246 
00247     return field;
00248 } // field_itr_get_next()
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:25 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
